--color-action-default.description: default color for interactive text elements like nav items

--color-action-hover.description: hover color for interactive text elements like nav items

--color-action-active.description: active color for interactive text elements like nav items

--color-action-indicator-hover.description: hover color for interactive indicator elements like nav items

--color-action-indicator-active.description: active color for interactive indicator elements like nav items
